message: @trust_boundary(non_raising=True) on 'extract' declares it never raises on source_param='arguments', but the raise at line 21 is guarded by a check on source_param-derived data — the boundary does raise on malformed input.
suggestion: This @trust_boundary(non_raising=True) declares it never raises on source_param, but a raise in the body is guarded by a check on source_param-derived data — so it DOES raise on malformed input. Either remove non_raising=True and add a real test_ref proving the raising behaviour, or restructure so the boundary returns a sentinel on bad input instead of raising.
